subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the Divine Throne, and thy cry hath been heard. Praised be God that thou hast attained unto this most great bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی العرش حاضر و ندایت استماع شد الحمد لله باین فیض اعظم فائز شدی و
subcodes.subjects: @meditation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
